arts.ttl: Frattesi’s future away from Inter: Roma top choice
arts.sum: Davide Frattesi's time at Inter Milan appears to be drawing to a close, with the midfielder actively seeking a move away from the club. Roma has emerged as his preferred destination, though a move abroad remains a possibility. The post Frattesi’s future away from Inter: Roma top choice appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan in talks with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor transfer
arts.sum: Noah Okafor's time at AC Milan may be coming to an end as the club engages in negotiations with RB Leipzig regarding a potential transfer. The Swiss forward, who has struggled to make a significant impact this season, scoring only one goal in 550 minutes across 16 appearances, is viewed as a surplus by the Rossoneri's management. The post Milan in talks with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor transfer appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Christian Pulisic can lift first AC Milan trophy today
arts.sum: That set up an all-Milan affair in the final, a meeting of the two best teams in Italy from the previous season. Pulisic has rediscovered his best form in Milan, becoming a key player for the Rossoneri and helping them to a runner-up place in Serie A last season.

arts.sum: Inter Milan are set to acquire a new central defender in the upcoming summer transfer window, though the specific target remains undetermined.
